name: Achievements — badge system renders honestly (no fake unlocked achievements)

planSteps.description: Wait up to 12 seconds for the page to render, including any achievement icons or animations
The page renders without an error boundary, blank screen, 404, or raw stack traces

If the user has no wallet connected, no achievements are shown as 'unlocked' or 'earned' — the page either shows a connect-wallet prompt or shows all achievements as 'locked' with clear unlock criteria

Any achievement counts, progress bars, or 'earned by' numbers show either honest values (0 for unconnected users) or are labeled clearly as demo/example data. The page must NOT show fabricated user achievement progress
